docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE PER SFSD, SERVICE WAS UNSUCCESSFUL BECAUSE THE DEFENDANT WAS NOT FOUND. FEE FOR SERVICE WAS WAIVED. FILED BY PLAINTIFF MOIWA, SIDNEY AS TO DEFENDANT BAUTISTA, JEFFREY
